reflection:
london gave you a rough night. heart at 55 instead of your 49 baseline, six wake-ups, vita sleep 2 out of 5, and you read it correctly yourself, the lebanese food or the chicken hit both you and cosita and your body spent the night clearing it. that's why you woke feverish and racy. trust that read.

what's harder is the speech. four days running now you've written some version of avoiding it. yesterday was the sharpest, bothers me that i am still not writing my speech, finding lots of excuses. this isn't a planning problem. it's the thing you keep walking around. and notice the same shape with michael, you said he's giving you exercises but not addressing the actual imbalance, you're being patient with being unseen. the body and the speech are asking for the same thing.

renzo is working. dizziness genuinely better, you said as much, that's solid. eumovate is on the dyshidrotic which is sitting at 4. food before bed is the lever that hurts most right now, last meal at 19 was fine, the food itself wasn't.

one thing for today: pick one paragraph of the speech and write it badly. not the whole thing, not the right tone, not the jokes, just one ugly paragraph on the page. avoidance shrinks when you put a bad version down.
opener: rough night from the food. and the speech is asking to be written.
focus_for_today: write one ugly paragraph of the speech. not good, just on the page.
